name: a4_dependency_audit_cli_retry2_20260421
outcome_goal: pip-audit and npm audit --audit-level=high both exit 0; patch-version bumps landed; minor/major bumps filed as bugs.

jobs.label: a4_dependency_audit
jobs.prompt: Run dependency hygiene. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/pyproject.toml; Code&DBs/Workflow/requirements.runtime.txt; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/package.json; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/package-lock.json; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/cloudflare_sandbox_bridge/package.json. Run pip-audit and npm audit --audit-level=high. Land patch-only bumps when verifier-gated. File bugs dep-audit::<package> for minor/major bumps and unresolved advisories. Done when both audits exit 0 or every remaining non-patch action is a bug. Transport constraint: use CLI only; do not use Anthropic API or any llm_task route.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "cd 'Code&DBs/Workflow' && pip-audit && cd surfaces/app && npm audit --audit-level=high"
